table.noResultsDesc: Create new overlays for your store

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: You can match product images with products or variants based on SKU, barcode, or title, and upload them from Google Drive or Dropbox.

setupGuide.title: Setup guide
setupGuide.description: Use this personalized guide to get your app up and running.

connectSource.title: Connect image source
connectSource.description: You can use Google Drive or Dropbox as your image source. Google Drive is selected by default.

matchImages.title: Match images
matchImages.description: Match images with products or variants based on SKU, barcode, title or metafields.

previewBulk.title: Preview & bulk upload images
previewBulk.description: Review your matching results and bulk upload images to your Shopify products.

tooltip.saveFirst: Preview is disabled until you save your overlay changes.
tooltip.noHandle: No product handle available to preview

toast.addOverlay: Please add at least one overlay.
toast.selectProduct: Please select at least one product.
toast.selectCollection: Please select at least one collection.
toast.fixErrors: Please fix the errors in your overlay(s).
toast.leaveWarning: Save or discard changes before leaving.

errors.textRequired: Please enter text for the text overlay.
errors.imageRequired: Please add an image for the image overlay.

statusModal.title: Update Status
statusModal.body: Are you sure to update status of this overlay?

publish.title: Is your overlay visible on your store?
publish.helpText: If your overlay is not displayed on the product page or you want it in a different position, contact us.

language.heading: App Language
language.description: Choose the language for your app interface.
language.label: Language

errors.patience: We are working on it. Thanks for your patience

modal.title: Change Plan
modal.limitWarning: This plan is limited to {{count}} products. If you usage exceeds this limit, excess products will be deactivated (but not deleted).
